section.h2: Top played tracks from the last month

section.div: Chromium fork for Windows XP/2003 and up
Cataclysm - Dark Days Ahead. A turn-based survival game set in a post-apocalyptic world.
🔧 Electron based open source toolbox, free integration of rich plug-ins. 基于 electron 的开源工具箱，自由集成丰富插件。
Lynis - Security auditing tool for Linux, macOS, and UNIX-based systems. Assists with compliance testing (HIPAA/ISO27001/PCI DSS) and system hardening. Agentless, and installation optional.

div.div: Great developer ranked 2.82m out of 131m users
Maintaining or created a repository which has been forked 3 times
Registered a GPG key to sign commits
Starred a topic on GitHub Explore
Use GitHub Actions to automate profile updates
Kill 20 Jockeys with the shovel or pitchfork.
Kill a pouncing Hunter with a shotgun.
Kill a Tank only with damage from the original Survivors.
Complete at least 10 unique premium deliveries in each order category with an evaluation of "Legend," "Legend of Legends," or "Legend of Legends of Legends."
Complete at least 10 unique premium deliveries in each order category with an evaluation of "Legend," "Legend of Legends," or "Legend of Legends of Legends."

Kill all of the snipers in City 17.
